question: What screens and features are in the v1 surface?
options: Dashboard + Scenarios/Forecasts + Assets with holdings attribution + Allocation view + Household settings
context: Depends on 5edebac0 (tracking chart), 2949f831 (Scenario/Forecast), a5edec0f (assets incl. manual), db09d3a5 (sync/CSV bridge). User added position-level holdings attribution and allocation/rebalancing; excluded expense tracking and notifications.
